I reached out to the support team and they just said they're aware of customers having issues.
insight: User is unable to access the app due to a login loop issue, preventing essential top-ups for pre-pay meters, and support has provided no meaningful resolution.

author: Unliterate internet user
body:
Why do you keep advising me to have a Smart Meter when the Engineer has been to assess the situation and advised me that it is not possible to fit one!! Second review of the day. Why are we getting all these stupid games and jigsaws. All I want to do is put my meter readings in. It was much easier to do on the old version. As an 80 year old women, I found the previous version easy. This updated version is overly complicated. I only want to put my metre readings in and can’t get to the correct page.

Meter Readings

The next meterreading is due and I haven’t changed my opinion. This new version is a complete mystery to me. How do you put your meter readings in? I’ve pressed every button but no good.
I’m afraid, I’m going to have to change suppliers. I can’t put up with this every three or four months. It was so easy before. Now it’s  just confusion. 
Geraldine Bruton Customer
insight: Elderly customer finds the redesigned app overly complicated and cannot easily submit meter readings, threatening to switch suppliers.

body:
The worst app I’ve ever used to top up my phone.

It doesn’t show the real account balance — everything is delayed or inaccurate. Information appears with a noticeable lag, so you’re never sure whether your top-up has actually been processed.

There’s no transparency, no real-time updates, and absolutely no sense of control over your own money. Extremely frustrating and unreliable.
insight: User experiences significant delays and inaccuracies in account balance display and transaction processing, creating uncertainty about payment status.

author: Iain-M
body: This app is buggy and does not deal properly with meters with intermittent communication. The latest version reports there is no data and asks you to enter a meter reading when going back through the daily history and coming across a day with no data. When there has not been a meter reading submitted, but the 30 minute data has been uploaded the app just averages the total and gives identical figures for the daily consumption on the days between readings, completely different from the total of the 30 minute readings.  Needs sorting.
insight: The app contains multiple bugs when handling smart meter data gaps and inconsistently calculates daily consumption figures compared to granular 30-minute readings.
